creator: a134qaed@gmail.com
text:
doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/geom/chapter.sgml contains multiple reference to /dev/ufs2 in it's page about geom label, when in src/sys/geom/label/g_label_ufs.c it's explicitly /dev/ufs

Fix: 

sed -i .bak s_/dev/ufs2_/dev/ufs_g doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/geom/chapter.sgml
How-To-Repeat: N/A
